subcodes.first_line: God hath shone forth from the horizon of the Prison upon thee, O thou who hast turned towards God, the Cleaver of Dawn. Blessed be the soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تجلی الله من افق السجن علیک یا ایها المقبل الی الله فالق الاصباح طوبی لنفس
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Word of God and human limitations, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
